title: Oops — Ranjan Dasgupta | You Found a Secret
description: Oops. You found something. A small secret from Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
You weren't supposed to find this. Or maybe you were. Ranjan Dasgupta hides a few doors in the site. This is one of them. If you're here, you're the kind of person who clicks through. That's the same instinct that makes programmatic work—curiosity, intent.

See you found me, secret level, and congratulations. For the main show, Work, About, Contact.

title: You Found Me — Ranjan Dasgupta | A Hidden Page
description: You found me. A hidden page by Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
Most people don't scroll this far. Or click that link. You did. Ranjan Dasgupta built this site and a few of these pages for people like you. The ones who look for the extra door. In AdTech we call that engagement. Here we just call it fun.

More secrets: oops, down the rabbit hole, hidden in plain sight. For the real stuff, Work, About, Contact.

title: Congratulations — Ranjan Dasgupta | You Did It
description: Congratulations. You did it. A reward from Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
You found a page that doesn't need to exist. But it does. Ranjan Dasgupta says well done. In a world of infinite scroll, you chose to dig. That's the same spirit that drives discovery in ads—finding the right audience, the right moment. See secret level and except you.

For the main site: Work, About, Insights, Contact.

title: Secret Level — Ranjan Dasgupta | Unlock
content:
Level loaded. No cheat code required—you got here on your own. Ranjan Dasgupta has been building AdTech for nine-plus years. This page is a side quest. The main game is programmatic, yield, and Work.

Other levels: the other door, the red pill, down the rabbit hole. About, Contact.

title: The Red Pill — Ranjan Dasgupta | Choose Again
description: The red pill. Choose again. A meta page by Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
You took the red pill. Now you see how the pipes work. Ranjan Dasgupta builds those pipes—exchanges, auctions, yield. This page is a nod to the idea that once you understand AdTech, you don't unsee it. See ads are in my DNA and programmatic advertising.

The other door, Work, About. Contact.

title: The Other Door — Ranjan Dasgupta | This One
description: The other door. This one. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
You chose the other door. Good. Ranjan Dasgupta left a few doors on this site. Some lead to Work and About. Some lead here. Every click is a micro-commitment—that's the same logic that runs programmatic. See the red pill and secret level.

Down the rabbit hole, Contact.

title: Down the Rabbit Hole — Ranjan Dasgupta | How Deep Does It Go?
description: Down the rabbit hole. How deep does it go? Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
It goes pretty deep. Header bidding, supply path optimization, first-price auctions. Ranjan Dasgupta has been down here for years. This page is a pit stop. For the full descent, programmatic advertising, exchange architecture, and Insights.

More holes: this page doesn't exist, or maybe it does. Work, About, Contact.

title: This Page Doesn't Exist — Ranjan Dasgupta | Or Does It?
description: This page doesn't exist. Or does it? Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
404 vibes, but you're here. So it exists. Ranjan Dasgupta built it. In AdTech we deal with existence all the time—impressions that did or didn't render, clicks that did or didn't happen. This page definitely exists. See or maybe it does and 404 but on purpose.

Work, About, Contact.

title: Or Maybe It Does — Ranjan Dasgupta | Schrödinger's Page
description: Or maybe it does. Schrödinger's page. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
Superposition: the page both exists and doesn't until you load it. You loaded it. So it exists. Ranjan Dasgupta is a fan of meta. For non-meta content, programmatic, Work, and About. For more meta, this page doesn't exist and glitch in the matrix.

Contact.

title: Glitch in the Matrix — Ranjan Dasgupta | Something's Different
description: Glitch in the matrix. Something's different. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
You noticed. This page is a glitch—intentional. Ranjan Dasgupta runs a site with a lot of pages. Most are serious. A few are not. This one is for the people who notice the glitches. In programmatic we optimize for the signal in the noise. You're the signal. See down the rabbit hole and no one will ever see this.

Work, About, Contact.

In AdTech we track viewability and invalid traffic. This page is valid. You're valid. See this page doesn't exist and hidden in plain sight.
